2603.29759.title: TSHA: A Benchmark for Visual Language Models in Trustworthy Safety Hazard Assessment Scenarios
2603.29759.paper_summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have accelerated their application to indoor safety hazards assessment. However, existing benchmarks suffer from three fundamental limitations: (1) heavy reliance on synthetic datasets constructed via simulation software, creating a significant domain gap with real-world environments; (2) oversimplified safety tasks with artificial constraints on hazard and scene types, thereby limiting model generalization; and (3) absence of rigorous evaluation protocols to thoroughly assess model capabilities in complex home safety scenarios. To address these challenges, we introduce TSHA (\textbf{T}rustworthy \textbf{S}afety \textbf{H}azards \textbf{A}ssessment), a comprehensive benchmark comprising 81,809 carefully curated training samples drawn from four complementary sources: existing indoor datasets, internet images, AIGC images, and newly captured images. This benchmark set also includes a highly challenging test set with 1707 samples, comprising not only a carefully selected subset from the training distribution but also newly added videos and panoramic images containing multiple safety hazards, used to evaluate the model's robustness in complex safety scenarios. Extensive experiments on 23 popular VLMs demonstrate that current VLMs lack robust capabilities for safety hazard assessment. Importantly, models trained on the TSHA training set not only achieve a significant performance improvement of up to +18.3 points on the TSHA test set but also exhibit enhanced generalizability across other benchmarks, underscoring the substantial contribution and importance of the TSHA benchmark.
2603.29759.paper_summary_zh: 最近在視覺-語言模型（VLMs）方面的進展加速了它們在室內安全隱患評估中的應用。<lb/>然而，現有的基準測試存在三個根本性限制：（1）過度依賴通過模擬軟體構建的合成數據集，造成與現實環境之間的顯著領域差距；<lb/>（2）安全任務過於簡化，對危險和場景類型施加了人為限制，從而限制了模型的泛化能力；<lb/>（3）缺乏嚴謹的評估協議，無法徹底評估模型在複雜家庭安全場景中的能力。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們介紹了TSHA（\textbf{T}rustworthy \textbf{S}afety \textbf{H}azards \textbf{A}ssessment），這是一個綜合基準，包括81,809個精心策劃的訓練樣本，來自四個互補來源：現有的室內數據集、互聯網圖片、AIGC圖片和新拍攝的圖片。<lb/>這個基準集還包括一個具有高度挑戰性的測試集，包含1707個樣本，不僅包括從訓練分佈中精心選擇的子集，還包括新添加的包含多個安全隱患的視頻和全景圖片，用於評估模型在複雜安全場景中的穩健性。<lb/>在23個流行的VLMs上進行的廣泛實驗表明，當前的VLMs在安全隱患評估方面缺乏穩健的能力。<lb/>重要的是，在TSHA訓練集上訓練的模型不僅在TSHA測試集上實現了高達+18.3分的顯著性能提升，還在其他基準上展現了增強的泛化能力，突顯了TSHA基準的重大貢獻和重要性。
2603.29759.author: Qiucheng Yu et.al.
2603.29759.authors: Qiucheng Yu, Ruijie Xu, Mingang Chen, Xuequan Lu, Jianfeng Dong, Chaochao Lu, Xin Tan
